summary: Round 2 fixes: vendored gpu_utils.sh (no external deps), accelerate YAML validation, PEFT-aware checkpoint loading, weight normalization for alpha/beta/rho sweeps, unit test suite. Pipeline fully self-contained and reproducible.
fixes_applied: Fixed MATH evaluation: _extract_boxed now handles nested braces (e.g. \boxed{\frac{1}{2}}), extract_numeric_answer uses _extract_boxed, MATH dataset loading with fallback (hendrycks/competition_math -> lighteval/MATH)
Fixed eval_phase_point.py: added --gsm8k_samples and --math_samples CLI args for per-dataset sample control
Fixed AdaBalance checkpoint resume: added on_save to AdaBalanceMetricsCallback and AdaBalanceCallback to persist controller state (rho, EMA, histories) in every checkpoint-N directory
Fixed AdaBalance state_dict/load_state_dict already existed in src/adabalance.py; train_adabalance.py already restores state on resume — now state is also saved at each checkpoint
Fixed setup.sh: added Python version validation (>= 3.10), verify output now checks all critical deps (torch, transformers, trl, accelerate, peft, datasets)
Fixed run_all_experiments.sh: added --from-phase N argument for mid-pipeline resume per CLAUDE.md docs
Fixed run_all_experiments.sh: improved argument parsing (supports --quick, --from-phase, unknown arg warning)
Fixed Phase 7 curriculum: already reads best (alpha, beta) from phase_analysis.json or scans Phase 2 eval JSONs; no longer limited to hardcoded defaults
Documented multi-GPU design: Phase 1 uses DDP via accelerate; sweep phases (2-5) use job-level parallelism with round-robin GPU scheduling — this is intentional for short independent training runs
Created src/__init__.py for explicit package declaration
run.sh dependency check already validates torch, transformers, datasets, trl, accelerate, peft
[Round 2] Removed external ../../_shared/gpu_utils.sh sourcing — pipeline uses only vendored scripts/gpu_utils.sh
[Round 2] Added accelerate YAML validation (file exists + valid YAML) before Phase 1 training
[Round 2] Fixed PEFT-aware checkpoint loading in eval_phase_point.py — detects adapter_config.json and uses AutoPeftModelForCausalLM

[Round 2] Added weight normalization in BalancedGRPOTrainer and RhoGRPOTrainer: weights normalized so w_pos + w_neg = 2, preventing alpha/beta sweep from confounding signal balance with global gradient scale
[Round 2] Added weight normalization in compute_balanced_grpo_loss with raw and normalized ratios logged
[Round 2] Created tests/test_grpo_dynamics.py with unit tests for stability analysis, rho-GRPO, balanced GRPO normalization, and answer extraction
